    D

    DISPLAY_NAME_OID - Static variable in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlAssertion
    OID for the common displayName attribute.

    E

    EDU_PERSON_PRINCIPAL_NAME_OID - Static variable in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlAssertion
    OID for the common eduPersonPrincipalName attribute.
    edu.iu.saml - package edu.iu.saml
     

    G

    getAssertions() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlPrincipal
    Gets assertions with released attributes.
    getAttributes() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlAssertion
    Gets attribute values.
    getAuthnAuthority() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlAssertion
    Gets the authnAuthority IDP entity ID.
    getAuthnAuthority() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlPrincipal
    Gets the entity ID of the authority that verified the principal user's credentials.
    getAuthnInstant() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlAssertion
    Gets the authnInstant authentication statement value.
    getAuthnInstant() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlPrincipal
    Gets the point in time authentication took place.
    getExpires() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlPrincipal
    Gets the point in time authentication expires, and after which the user must authenticate again with the IDP.
    getNotBefore() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlAssertion
    Gets the notBefore condition value.
    getNotOnOrAfter() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlAssertion
    Gets the notOnOrAfter condition value.
    getPrincipalIdentity(IuRequestAttributes) - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlServiceProvider
    Gets the authenticated SAML principal.

    I

    initRequest(URI, URI) - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlServiceProvider
    Initiate an authentication request.
    iu.util.saml - module iu.util.saml
    IU SAML 2.0 Service Provider API module
    IuSamlAssertion - Interface in edu.iu.saml
    Represents an assertion issued by a SAML Identity Provider.
    IuSamlPrincipal - Interface in edu.iu.saml
    Designates an authenticated principal identity.
    IuSamlServiceProvider - Interface in edu.iu.saml
    SAML 2.0 Service Provider interface.

    M

    MAIL_OID - Static variable in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlAssertion
    OID for the common mail (email address) attribute.
    metadata() - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlServiceProvider
    Gets configured SP metadata as raw XML.

    V

    verifyResponse(IuRequestAttributes, String, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.saml.IuSamlServiceProvider
    Handles a SAML assertion consumer service POST request.
